title: equisetum aquatile
intro: Equisetum aquatile, also known as water horsetail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Equisetum aquatile include its ability to support kidney and urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and improve bone density. The herbal preparations of Equisetum aquatile can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
